name: default-ai-engineering-stack
description: The framework calls a code knowledge-graph MCP (codebase-memory) as a REQUIRED impact-analysis gate, via scripts/code_graph.py (opt out with AI_DISCIPLINE_GRAPH_OPTIONAL=1). Semgrep is the optional Verify security-scan gate. Spec / Loop / Memory are the framework's own Markdown templates plus the AI agent.

verify.why: Invoked by execute_request.py as the security-scan gate. Optional: if it is not installed, the scan is reported as skipped (not a failure) and everything else still works.

impact.why: REQUIRED (hard dependency). The framework calls it via scripts/code_graph.py during verify: index_repository builds the graph and detect_changes computes the blast radius (which interfaces a change affects), so the gate can demand tests for affected-but-untested interfaces. Not a pip package — build the binary (see code_graph.py INSTALL_HINT). The agent can additionally use the same MCP (detect_changes/explore) when filling the spec. Opt out with AI_DISCIPLINE_GRAPH_OPTIONAL=1 (framework self-test / environments that cannot compile the binary) to fall back to hand-filled impact analysis.
